message:
feat(tui): implement context-aware quick actions and macro execution (br-3vwi.8.2)

Add focused_event() across 8 screens (Agents, Messages, Threads, Search,
Reservations, ToolMetrics, Explorer + existing Timeline) so the command
palette can inject context-aware quick actions from the currently focused
entity.

Extend build_quick_actions() with macro-category actions beyond navigation:
- Thread: summarize thread, view messages in thread
- Agent: fetch inbox, view reservations
- Tool: view call history
- Message: view message in context

Wire macro action dispatch in tui_app.rs with toast notifications.
Add 18 new tests (1466 total, 0 clippy warnings).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
